action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start, no files yet. Analysis: Need to train PPO on 10 HumanoidBench h1hand tasks. Key constraints: (1) no info_keywords='success' for 8/10 tasks, (2) use cumulative reward >= success_bar for success, (3) per-task models since obs dims differ. Strategy: Train per-task PPO with VecNormalize, use SubprocVecEnv with spawn method. Start with a quick env test, then train all 10 tasks. Decision: Write train.py and predict.py, do a quick test first, then start training.
